method: COMMENT_EVALUATION batch 1 — routes (researcher-approved 2026-06-02). Three A7 DIMENSION_REVIEW comments whose content belongs to another cluster: surfaced, assigned to the home cluster via an SD_CLUSTER pointer (non-A6-gating; surfaces as the target's D2 for resolution at its turn), source folded for M38. No M38 finding. (144 handled separately; 127/146/147/148 deferred pending division/yielding home decision.)

new_flags.description: Routed from M38 A7 (DIM-039-002, wa_session_b_findings id 107). asōtia (debauchery; clustered to M28). Eph 5:18 contrasts debauchery (disordered inner filling) with being filled with the Spirit — a fundamental inner-being polarity: disordered inner filling vs divine inner filling. When M28 (Envy/Greed/Lust) is analysed, resolve into an M28 finding mapping the debauchery ↔ Spirit-filling antithesis (and whether it reflects a broader defilement vs Spirit-cleansing pattern).

Routed from M38 A7 (DIM-180-002, wa_session_b_findings id 128). dōron/didōmi gift-vocabulary (reg 180 yielding; dōron clustered to M39): giving is the domain where inner character is most directly revealed — generosity, greed, love, indifference, dependence, gratitude all surface through the giving action. When M39 (Blessing/Favour/Grace) is analysed, resolve into a finding treating giving as a primary inner-being diagnostic.

new_flags.cluster_link_basis: comment-evaluation route (content = obedience → M30; terms sha.ma/qashav currently in M41 — flag mis-clustering)
new_flags.description: Routed from M38 A7 (DIM-187-001, wa_session_b_findings id 158). 1Sam 15:22 declares obedience (sha.ma H8085H) and attentive listening (qashav H7181) greater than sacrifice — the obedience/listening valuation as the higher register of inner-being orientation toward God. CONTENT belongs to M30 (Obedience & Disobedience). NOTE: sha.ma/qashav are presently clustered to M41 (Remembrance) — likely a mis-clustering. When M30 is analysed, resolve into a finding on the obedience-over-sacrifice hierarchy and the sha.ma/qashav paired responsive orientation, and reassess the M41 term placement.

fold_findings.resolution_note: Routed to M28 via SD_CLUSTER (debauchery ↔ Spirit-filling belongs to M28; gated M38 only via reg 39 → sōzō). Folded for M38; full text preserved here for provenance.
Routed to M39 via SD_CLUSTER (giving-as-diagnostic; dōron clustered to M39). Folded for M38.
Routed to M30 via SD_CLUSTER (obedience > sacrifice). sha.ma/qashav term placement in M41 flagged for review. Folded for M38.
